name: Intel SPI protected regions
description: Intel SPI protected regions prevent host writes to protected firmware regions.
failure-impact: When protected regions are not locked, an attacker with operating system access may be able to tamper with firmware.

failure-results.not-found: Intel SPI protection state not available
failure-results.not-locked: Intel SPI protected regions not locked

resolution: Contact your OEM, who may be able to issue a firmware update.
